description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior features a combination of white and brown materials, with large glass windows providing ample natural light. There is a prominent vertical chimney structure and a rooftop garden area, adding greenery to the design. The front includes a covered porch with a small water feature and landscaped hedges along the perimeter. The property is surrounded by a paved walkway and driveway, with additional green spaces and shrubs. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open spaces and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, rooftop garden, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, water feature, and vertical chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop garden, balcony, and extensive hedges along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the main entrance, large window panels, and a clear view of the flat roof and chimney.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view emphasizing the rooftop garden, balcony, and overall layout of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped large windows and corner glazing
